query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds, modelTotal, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, publishedModel FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-19' AND sport = 'NCAAM' AND (awayTeam = 'tcu' OR awayTeam = 'troy');
